return(function(...)local L={"\119\047\085\090\068\111\107\121\088\101\075\076","\080\101\102\120\110\067\061\061","\089\043\103\057\100\078\107\049\107\120\078\102\068\057\079\048";"\056\053\057\118\048\068\116\099\048\056\061\061";"\122\069\110\090\068\111\049\061","\079\122\077\085\057\098\061\061";"\049\055\074\121\048\056\099\076\056\103\098\061","\076\056\061\061","\069\105\085\120\119\067\061\061","\119\069\049\075\051\121\122\119\056\084\122\099\119\070\100\113","\119\047\079\079\106\116\061\061";"\071\078\078\080\067\073\057\119","\107\075\067\111\118\068\056\061";"\068\043\085\079\122\097\066\121\106\112\076\086\122\067\061\061";"\100\043\078\084\088\067\061\061","\109\051\080\047\073\105\066\076\109\097\100\043\087\043\051\067","\072\111\049\052\120\116\061\061","\051\076\079\056\068\112\103\108\073\048\105\115\066\051\080\076";"\101\107\103\112\089\070\100\109\051\112\119\047\080\069\107\049\088\067\061\061";"\122\084\122\109\066\084\083\057";"\122\047\107\121\068\101\107\121\119\069\080\079\119\112\108\076";"\101\120\052\050\066\105\119\084\080\105\103\102\087\057\073\047\068\043\056\061";"\100\101\075\067\119\101\066\102","\082\102\120\047\119\070\108\088\081\106\105\057\112\052\077\061","\109\097\079\109\107\097\056\075\056\069\110\088\122\121\080\103";"\072\080\099\075\121\051\121\061","\106\111\080\090\088\101\075\120";"\071\118\089\074\066\081\074\090";"\119\048\078\113\109\109\052\097\051\120\079\080\051\047\075\088\066\043\049\061","\109\043\080\087\088\109\100\069\068\043\105\113\101\097\052\102";"\087\076\066\086\066\101\066\122\107\101\048\090\088\057\052\070\056\084\098\061","\110\109\077\055","\070\052\057\066\052\057\048\061","\106\043\078\103\106\120\073\061";"\076\072\105\074\083\111\078\111\053\116\061\061","\089\048\085\119\119\111\110\078\100\107\079\119\109\112\103\051";"\118\109\070\106\043\098\121\061";"\068\116\061\061";"\100\043\085\084\100\097\110\103\068\112\106\061","\097\085\088\071\082\074\102\072\107\054\100\105\085\117\071\061","\105\077\106\070\115 function w(w)return L[w+((-433506+1299541)+-814149)]end for w,b in b(L,{Q;j;z,B,s;V},w,l)end return Q end,function(b,Q,j,z)local C,OC,dC,s,bC,e,zC,x,K,f,wC,PC,rC,nC,T,W,UC,yC,t,lC,aC,eC,SC,a,NC,F,cC,vC,I,n,VC,p,D,q,sC,jC,X,QC,U,o,LC,WC,m,u,G,FC,CC,JC,xC,R,M,ZC,GC,YC,hC,v,k,EC,HC,pC,BC,TC,DC,g,y,mC,gC,A,P,O,uC,i while b do if b<(1814442-781933)+-623528 then SC=JC b=UC b=-20831+906138 else b=jC and 1167193-(-357887)or-638511+(-398937+8780501)end else m=#W b=((67627+-106033)+876625)+2443893 p=-963042+963042 x=m==p end end else if b<1358314-317948 then if b<(1338976-305293)+-10953 then if b<-20944-(-926484)then cC=SC b=NC b=696921+(8226884-(-78102))else p=C b=p g[p]=b p=nil b=9620033-(-500823)end else P,D=G(F,P)b=P and
